\tzpentry{ID4015}{Coupled Quantum Curvature Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4015 introduces Coupled Quantum Curvature Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.

\[R_{ij} = \\\\\\\\frac{1}{\\\\\\\\hbar}\\\\\\\\left| \\\\\\\\langle i | \\\\\\\\hat{H}_T | j \\\\\\\\rangle \\\\\\\\right|^2,\\\\\\\\]
